changes.description: Added explicit per-unit conversion (BASE_MVA=100) for DC power flow to produce angles in radians (<1.0). Restructured economic dispatch with double-clamping and explicit output format requirements. Replaced Python examples with per-unit-aware code.

notes: economic-dispatch capped at 80/100 due to task definition bug: testPattern 'within limits' does not match test name 'all generators within min/max limits' (regex fails because 'min/max' appears between 'within' and 'limits'). The within-limits criterion always scores 0 regardless of actual test result. Maximum achievable: power-flow=100, economic-dispatch=80.
